description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when font assets are missing/unresolvable. Verifies canonical error contract: Composition/Layer/Asset/Path tokens emitted in stderr; NO silent fallback (no 'fallback frame', 'black frame', 'continue on error' markers); exit code != 0; output MP4 file absent after run.
honesty_note: If a future chronon3d_cli invocation emits tokens using snake_case ('composition_id', 'layer_id', etc.) instead of CamelCase, the regex matcher is case-insensitive so the assertion still passes — verified per AGENTS.md §honesty contract.
